name: soa-clean-microservices
description: Clean Node.js microservices project with API Gateway, gRPC, REST, GraphQL, Kafka and SQLite.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,gateway,chat,model,activity -c green,blue,cyan,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w @luna/web" "npm run dev -w @soa/api-gateway" "npm run dev -w @soa/chat-service" "npm run dev -w @soa/model-service" "npm run dev -w @soa/activity-service"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently -n gateway,chat,model,activity -c blue,cyan,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w @soa/api-gateway" "npm run dev -w @soa/chat-service" "npm run dev -w @soa/model-service" "npm run dev -w @soa/activity-service"
scripts.start: concurrently -n web,gateway,chat,model,activity -c green,blue,cyan,yellow,magenta "npm run start -w @luna/web" "npm run start -w @soa/api-gateway" "npm run start -w @soa/chat-service" "npm run start -w @soa/model-service" "npm run start -w @soa/activity-service"
scripts.start:backend: concurrently -n gateway,chat,model,activity -c blue,cyan,yellow,magenta "npm run start -w @soa/api-gateway" "npm run start -w @soa/chat-service" "npm run start -w @soa/model-service" "npm run start -w @soa/activity-service"
scripts.build:backend: npm run build -w @soa/api-gateway && npm run build -w @soa/chat-service && npm run build -w @soa/model-service && npm run build -w @soa/activity-service
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @soa/api-gateway && npm run typecheck -w @soa/chat-service && npm run typecheck -w @soa/model-service && npm run typecheck -w @soa/activity-service && npm run typecheck -w @luna/web
